MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anna Wong, Defendant, appeared in pro per.
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

Ruling - There being no appearance by the Plaintiff, the Court orders Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted off calendar.
